title: Gluten-Free Toasted Crunchy Delight
description: A simple and crunchy gluten-free snack made with toasted bread and sweet accompaniments.
instructions: Preheat the toaster or toaster oven to 350°F (175°C).
Slice the British bread into 1-inch cubes.
Place the bread cubes into the toaster or toaster oven and toast until lightly browned.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crunchy snack and sweet jam.
Once the bread is toasted, place it on a serving plate or individual plates.
Spoon the crunchy snack mixture onto the toasted bread.
Top with additional sweet jam or crunchy snack to taste.
